title: ChangeSize
description: Adds a custom crafteable device capable of changing your player's size.
body:
# ChangeSize Datapack This datapack implements a new crafteable device which makes you able to change your size
(affecting speed, health, jump height, etc). To use, just right-click the device and a "gui" (written book) will pop up. There are 5 modes.
Modes > Titan (scale 10) > > Giant (scale 2) > > Dwarf (scale 0.6) > > Smally Dolly (scale 0.4) > > Jumping Ant (scale 0.2) >
Example use ![example_use1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7dd00a3d3ec668814217c7c95b12b9267bf1c91.png)
⚠️ Remember to use your respective version's required resourcepack. ## Device recipe: ![revice_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fb40f31eb29d122b134c40346144c3c919b46ef.webp)
